---
name: Content Request
about: Suggest a new topic, exercise, or improvement
title: "[Request] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to see?**
Describe the topic, exercise, or improvement.

**Which chapter does this relate to?**
(e.g., Chapter 15 - Math for LLMs)

**Why is this valuable?**
How would this help learners understand AI/ML math better?

**Additional context**
Any references, papers, or resources that could help.
